'''Feq''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and a skilled [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. He worked with [[Dannen Lifehold]], who was also his best friend, on Lifehold's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] the [[Lifeline (YT-1300 light freighter)|''Lifeline'']]. He was shot [[Death/Legends|dead]] by a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during a customs inspection of the ''Lifeline''.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1stm}}
